title: /string
description: The mod adds /sting command which fills inventory with stacks of string
body:
##  This mod adds /string command

**The /string command fills empty slots of your inventory with stacks of string and has a cooldown of 120 seconds!**

Recommended to use on SMP/ECO servers.


**However this is a remake of a /string plugin that was originally for paper/bukkit/spigot**
